P

parseBulletPoints(String) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.BulletPointHelper
Parses bullet point text into a list of individual points without bullet symbols.
PrivateEventInvitationRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
 
PrivateEventInvitationRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.PrivateEventInvitationRepository
Creates a new repository instance and initializes the Firestore database reference.
PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SearchCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface used to return matching entrant profiles and their corresponding user IDs after a search.
PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SimpleCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface used to return the success status of a repository operation.
Profile - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Model class representing a user profile in the SyntaxEvents application.
Profile() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.
Profile(String, String, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, String) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.Profile
Constructs a fully initialized Profile.
ProfileAdapter - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
RecyclerView adapter that binds a list of Profile objects to individual profile cards in the admin user management screen.
ProfileAdapter(ArrayList<Profile>, ArrayList<String>, ArrayList<Boolean>) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ProfileAdapter
Constructs the adapter with the provided data lists.
ProfileRepository - com.example.syntaxappproject中的类
Repository class responsible for managing Profile data in Firebase Firestore for the SyntaxEvents application.
ProfileRepository() - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ProfileRepository
Constructs a ProfileRepository and initializes the Firestore instance.
ProfileRepository(boolean) - 类的构造器 com.example.syntaxappproject.ProfileRepository
 
ProfileRepository.ProfileCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for operations that return a Profile.
ProfileRepository.RepositoryCallback - com.example.syntaxappproject中的接口
Callback interface for operations that return a success or failure result.
put(String, Bitmap) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageCacheManager
Stores a bitmap in the cache.
putBase64(String, String) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.ImageCacheManager
Stores a Base64 string in the cache.
